channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Ether traders see 'larger bounce' after ETH price taps $2.2K
item.description: Ether traders said ETH price could see further upside as long as bulls defended the $2,100 support, fuelled by renewed demand.

item.title: 38% of altcoins near all-time lows, worse than FTX crash: Analyst
item.description: The crypto altcoin market is in turmoil as investor sentiment plummets and digital asset prices fail to recover from the October 2025 crash.

item.title: ZeroHash Applies for National Trust Bank Charter as OCC Crypto Pipeline Grows
item.description: ZeroHash wants OCC trust bank status for crypto custody—and Revolut is gunning for a full U.S. banking license.

item.title: Core Scientific secures up to $1B credit from Morgan Stanley for data centers
item.description: The Bitcoin miner and data center operator said the financing will support infrastructure tied to high-density computing workloads, including artificial intelligence and HPC.

item.title: Son of U.S. government contractor, accused of stealing millions in seized crypto, arrested in France
item.description: John “Lick” Daghita was arrested in a joint FBI-France operation after allegations he siphoned tens of millions of dollars in crypto from government seizure wallets managed by his father’s company.

item.title: Sanctions evasions using crypto increased by 700% in 2025: Chainalysis
item.description: Russia, Iran and North Korea expanded their use of stablecoins, hacked funds and state-linked exchanges to move more than $100 billion onchain to evade international sanctions.

item.title: CleanSpark sold 97% of February bitcoin production to fund AI pivot
item.description: The cash flow generated will support the bitcoin miner's expansion into AI and high-performance computing data centers.

item.title: Cardano's ADA Token Now Accepted at Spar Supermarkets in Switzerland
item.description: Brick-and-mortar retail payments in Swiss Spar stores are enabled through the Cardano blockchain’s integration with DFX.swiss.

item.title: SoFi taps BitGo to provide infrastructure for bank-issued stablecoin
item.description: BitGo will support the rollout of US dollar-pegged stablecoin SoFiUSD, as US fintechs and banks expand digital dollar infrastructure following new federal legislation.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Predictions Flip Bullish, But Ethereum Is Still Stuck
item.description: Prediction market traders are becoming more bullish on Bitcoin's near-term price, but they're not as confident on Ethereum.

item.title: FBI arrests custody company CEO‘s son over alleged $46M crypto theft
item.description: FBI director Kash Patel posted a photo a handcuffed John Daghita, as well as one of seized items including cash, thumb drives, a phone and devices resembling hardware wallets.

item.title: Federal Contractor’s Son Arrested, Charged With Stealing $46 Million From US Crypto Stockpile
item.description: John Daghita was publicly accused of the crime by blockchain sleuth ZachXBT in January.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization offers always-on global investment access
item.description: Using blockchain technology, tokenization is creating a new, always-on investment market, giving people worldwide easy and fractional access to wealth-building assets.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back to near $71,000 even as software sector soars
item.description: The two battered markets have had a nearly one-to-one correlation in recent months, but are moving in opposite directions on Thursday.

item.title: Bitcoin trader sees 'lower soon' as BTC price starts to erase $74K breakout
item.description: BTC price upside lost momentum after hitting one-month highs as more traders joined bearish predictions for Bitcoin's next move.

item.title: Core Scientific Secures Up to $1 Billion From Morgan Stanley for Pivot From Bitcoin Mining to AI
item.description: The firm continues to pivot away from Bitcoin mining.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 FBI Director Kash Patel announces they arrested a government contractor who stole more than $46 million in crypto from the U.S Marshals Service. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1PRmtzMF81dExUYWVNakY4aHp6b0pMYjVzV2kza1RmN1RScU9SM0kzYTRZYWZBOFNmVmxHMFE2eWRLSWxUVFRSY05UNTBqaGtGczlZMmVjQVpndFFmS0M0eTdWWWFadXM?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 FBI Director…

item.title: John Daghita (Lick) was arrested in the Caribbean yesterday as a direct result of my investigation. In late January 2026, I exposed how John stole $ 46M+ in seized crypto assets from the US government by abusing access at CMDSS, his father's company, whi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5mOVNEN0Q3NGZtQmVmbnhLaVhwYkl0azhoUEMxOXpsSUNURWZydWdJTGhqcWlab0lDR1VmVzl4WGhsbGRBcmVRN1NXcFA4aWo4b25VUEpMaVpyS3o1?oc=5" target="_blank">John Daghita (Lick) was arrested in the Ca…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morning Minute: Kraken Cracks the Fed
item.description: Kraken made crypto history yesterday, receiving federal banking access that's been sought after by the industry for years.

item.title: Cardano can now be used to pay at 137 Spar stores across Switzerland
item.description: Supermarket giant Spar has enabled ADA payment rails for customers in 137 Swiss stores, as the country moves closer to its global crypto hub ambitions.

item.title: OKB Token Surges 38% on NYSE’s OKX Investment at $25B Valuation
item.description: The New York Stock Exchange’s parent company has invested in crypto exchange OKX as part of a push into tokenized stocks.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) drops 3.5% as nearly all assets decline
item.description: Litecoin (LTC), down 2.8% since yesterday, joined Stellar (XLM) as an underperformer.

item.title: Core Scientific secures up to $1 billion loan facility from Morgan Stanley
item.description: The company initially closed a $500 million loan facility that includes an accordion feature allowing the total commitment to expand to $1 billion..

item.title: Bitcoin’s drawdown hasn’t shaken institutional investors yet, says CoinShares
item.description: Professional investors trimmed exposure but largely held firm during BTC’s recent slump, while long-term allocators quietly added positions, the crypto asset manager said.

item.title: Revolut makes second attempt at US bank charter, appoints new US CEO
item.description: Revolut’s renewed push for a US banking license follows a failed 2021 attempt, as the $75 billion fintech expands globally.

item.title: NYSE owner ICE invests in OKX at $25B as tokenized stocks plan takes shape
item.description: Intercontinental Exchange will take a board seat at OKX and plans to bring NYSE-listed tokenized stocks and derivatives to the crypto exchange’s users in 2026.

item.title: Crypto-friendly fintech giant Revolut files for U.S. banking license
item.description: The license would allow the firm to operate like a traditional bank and gain direct access to payment networks like Fedwire and ACH.

item.title: Bitcoin bears 'annihilated' as analysis sees $65K support test next
item.description: Bitcoin liquidity analysis described bulls as in control after the trip to $74,000, but a support retest could take BTC price action almost $10,000 lower.

item.title: Crypto Crime in 2025 Was Primarily Driven by 694% Surge in State-Driven Sanctions Evasion Volume
item.description: TL;DR The value received by sanctioned entities surged 694% in 2025, driving total illicit transaction volume to a record $154… The post Crypto Crime in 2025 Was Primarily Driven by 694% Surge in State-Driven Sanctions Evasion Volume appea…

item.title: Ethereum ETFs Draw In $169M, Highest Level in Two Months
item.description: Ethereum ETFs saw inflows of $169 million Wednesday, as geopolitical tensions and price reset institutions’ crypto appetite.

item.title: New York Stock Exchange owner values crypto exchange OKX at $25 billion in new partnership
item.description: ICE also made a strategic investment in OKX at a valuation of $25 billion and plans to launch new tokenized stocks and crypto futures products.

item.title: JUST IN: New York Stock Exchange parent company ICE invests in Bitcoin exchange OKX at a $25 BILLION valuation 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5CZjNhS2JqSjRGRi1PdXFIbW03OXJsTUplVnBPRElNN2FQTUxiTTA0czMtZE10a1daTXQwTy1UTjhoa0pZWGRCVXZPTnBjUW1DdGN1Y0djZVRkR01yLW8tOWNtb3lnLXc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: New York Stock Exc…

item.title: These 4 Bitcoin charts say BTC price is forming a bottom
item.description: Bitcoin’s recent pullback toward $60,000 was likely a buy-the-dip opportunity with the price set to recover, several key technical indicators suggested.

item.title: Bitcoin takes aim at $74,000. Surprisingly, the dollar's rallying too.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 5, 2026

item.title: FATF Flags Peer-to-Peer Stablecoin Transfers as Top Money Laundering Risk
item.description: The Financial Action Task Force wants issuers to embed freeze and deny-list controls directly into smart contracts.

item.title: Bitcoin holds above $72,000 as crypto market pauses after breakout
item.description: Bitcoin and ether edged higher as traders assessed macro risks, derivatives positioning and whether bitcoin can sustain a push toward $80,000.

item.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin board members scoop up stock following earnings
item.description: Board members Justin Mateen and Richard Busch bought roughly 1.6 million shares after the trading window reopened following the bitcoin miner’s latest earnings report.

item.title: UAE central bank says financial system stable amid missile and drone attacks
item.description: More than 1,800 crypto businesses operate in the UAE, with over 600 Web3 companies based in Dubai’s DMCC free zone.

item.title: Andreessen Horowitz crypto arm said to seek $2 billion for fifth fund: Fortune
item.description: The venture firm led by Chris Dixon is reportedly aiming to close its fifth crypto fund in the first half of 2026, signaling continued bets on blockchain startups.

item.title: Chamath Palihapitiya questions bitcoin’s role as central bank reserve asset
item.description: Billionaire Venture capitalist points to privacy and fungibility concerns, while debate grows over corporate bitcoin strategies such as Strategy’s massive holdings.

item.title: Coinbase execs face new lawsuit seeking damages, insider profit clawbacks
item.description: The lawsuit seeks damages for Coinbase, governance reforms and the return of compensation and profits allegedly earned by insiders amid the company’s compliance failures.

item.title: Reform UK tops donations with millions from Thailand-based crypto investor: Report
item.description: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK reportedly secured a second boost of 3 million British pounds ($4 million) from Thailand-based crypto investor Christopher Harborne

item.title: ZeroHash applies for national trust bank charter to expand regulated stablecoin services
item.description: A charter would allow ZeroHash to operate under a single federal framework, rather than state-by-state rules and offer services aligned with recent legislation.

item.title: IREN to expand processing capacity by 50%, prepares at-the-market offering
item.description: The company ordered more than 50,000 Nvidia GPUs and filed for a potential $6 billion at-the-market share sale, sending the stock lower in pre-market trading.

item.title: Stablecoin inflows rebound to $1.7B as Washington battles over yield rules
item.description: Messari said weekly stablecoin inflows rose 414% to $1.7 billion as debate over yield-bearing stablecoins continued to stall US crypto market structure talks.

item.title: Resistance level has been reached for #Bitcoin. Obviously, first test, there won't be a clear breakout taking place. Things take time and a build-up is required. However, as the short-term trend has switched to upwards, I think it's the most vital trend switch we se - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5JLTBTVlFoSHZ0ZW1pM1k0NmxCZlJEaHNoQklRNGdkZkpIRjNUQzhpbl9UOG1zMklkNkpPb1dBTU5mMVNHLVJwbEZtZWlmTDRCSWRjZGl4REIzWG80dXVpTncyYw?oc=5" target="_blank">Resistance level has been reache…

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $462M as BTC briefly tops $73K
item.description: BlackRock’s IBIT led inflows with $307 million as almost all US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded inflows on Wednesday, extending a three-day inflow streak totaling $1.1 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin traders, alert: The rally is nearing a two-year 'make or break' price zone
item.description: The cryptocurrency traders near key price zone that has marked major turning points over the past two years.

item.title: Anthropic reopens Pentagon talks as tech groups push Trump to drop risk tag: FT
item.description: Anthropic previously secured a $200 million Pentagon contract, and its AI has been used in classified operations, including support for US airstrikes on Iran, the Financial Times reports.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin rebounds to $74K for the first time in a month as altcoins like Solana, Chainlink, and Pepe post major single-day gains amid global FUD, per Santiment. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFA2R0tISHlkTmFvcW1neDhsdk52cVBOdXNxRk9fbDlpZ0lna0dQTzlVUzJtUEVEMjZRYWhMSnNjYWpDOFpIR3NFYU56elp3U2lJc0RlbnpELVpRR3BlVUJHSWNRWUI?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin rebounds to …

item.title: Ether, solana, xrp surge 8% as crypto markets rally on easing war fears
item.description: Ether surged 7.5%, dogecoin jumped 7.5%, and solana added 5.3% as global equities rebounded and $700 million flowed into U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs since the start of March.

item.title: Crypto stocks rally as Trump, regulators signal pro-crypto policy shift
item.description: Bitcoin has jumped as well, increasing 7.6% in the last 24 hours, while Ether is up more than 8.3% to trade at $2,132.

item.title: Google uncovers iOS exploit kit used in crypto phishing attacks
item.description: Researchers say fake crypto websites deployed an iOS exploit kit capable of stealing wallet seed phrases and other financial data.

item.title: Bitcoin trading firm suggests a bullish trade with a key financing twist
item.description: The strategy aims to build upside exposure in March and April while minimizing upfront cost.

item.title: Senator Flags White House 'Corruption' Concerns Over Iran War Predictions Markets
item.description: The senator has slammed predictions markets betting on war in the Middle East, accusing White House officials of corruption.

item.title: Canadian Robbed of Crypto via ATM Kiosk, Recovery Efforts Lead to Another Scam Attempt
item.description: Police say scammers used RCMP branding to target a Nanaimo victim in a crypto recovery scheme after an earlier fraud.

item.title: Big Tech Joins White House Energy Pledge as Iran Tensions Threaten Higher Costs
item.description: Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI agreed to fund electricity supply and grid upgrades as AI energy demands spike.

item.title: 🔥 TODAY: Bitwise donates $233,000 to Bitcoin open-source developers as part of its annual commitment to reinvest 10% of $BITB gross profits back into the ecosystem. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBpQklJQ0h1Q3dhRWZBUGxYRGdDVkVod1Z6dGh3akl4MmVGTnBKOHNCc0xmbE5BMGVGa1l4YWk3bXJSOVhxQmptNUduRnltZmRVZWNiV3pnOG52bXdBdkpOZmg4YUM?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 TODAY: Bitwise donates $233,…

item.title: How Policy Shifts, Geopolitical Tensions Are Reshaping the Bitcoin Trade
item.description: Fresh ETF inflows, policy momentum and a deeper integration with the financial system are beginning to shift sentiment, analysts say.
